sentences: Dear Ms. Thompson, I am writing to express my strong interest in the Marketing Coordinator position advertised on your company's website.
With three years of experience in digital marketing and a proven track record of increasing online engagement, I believe I would be a valuable addition to your team.
steps.question: Why was this letter written?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지는 왜 작성되었는가?
choices: (A) To apply for an advertised job position
(B) To recommend another candidate for the role
(C) To request a promotion within the company
(D) To follow up on a previous interview
steps.kr: Thompson 씨께, 귀사 웹사이트에 광고된 마케팅 코디네이터 직책에 강한 관심을 표현하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 디지털 마케팅 3년 경험과 온라인 참여도 향상의 검증된 실적으로, 저는 귀사 팀에 소중한 인재가 될 것이라 확신합니다.

sentences: I have attached my résumé and a portfolio of recent campaigns for your review.
I am available for an interview at your earliest convenience and can be reached at j.park@email.com or at 555-0192.
steps.question: What has the writer included with the letter?
steps.question_kr: 작성자가 편지와 함께 포함한 것은?
choices: (A) A letter of recommendation
(B) A résumé and portfolio
(C) A list of professional references
(D) A sample marketing plan
steps.kr: 이력서와 최근 캠페인 포트폴리오를 첨부했습니다. 편하신 시간에 면접이 가능하며 j.park@email.com 또는 555-0192로 연락 주시기 바랍니다.

sentences: During my time at Apex Solutions, I led a social media campaign that grew our follower count by 45% in just six months.
I am confident that similar strategies could be effectively applied to your brand's digital presence.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the letter writer?
steps.question_kr: 편지 작성자에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) She has experience growing social media audiences
(B) She specializes in traditional advertising
(C) She recently graduated from university
(D) She previously worked at Ms. Thompson's company
choices_kr: (B) 소셜 미디어 팔로워 증가 경험이 있다
steps.kr: Apex Solutions에서 소셜 미디어 캠페인을 이끌어 6개월 만에 팔로워 수를 45% 늘렸습니다. 유사한 전략이 귀사 브랜드의 디지털 존재감에 효과적으로 적용될 수 있다고 확신합니다.

sentences: Dear Team, I am writing to inform you that our quarterly review meeting, originally scheduled for Thursday, has been moved to Friday, October 18, at 2:00 P.M.
The change was necessary due to a conflict in the conference room booking system.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this email?
steps.question_kr: 이 이메일의 목적은 무엇인가?
choices: (A) To cancel the quarterly review meeting
(B) To request agenda items from team members
(C) To introduce a new meeting format
(D) To notify staff of a rescheduled meeting
steps.kr: 팀 여러분, 목요일로 예정되어 있던 분기별 검토 회의가 10월 18일 금요일 오후 2시로 변경되었음을 알려드립니다. 회의실 예약 시스템 충돌로 인해 변경이 필요했습니다.

sentences: The meeting will take place in Conference Room B on the third floor.
Please bring your updated project reports and be prepared to discuss Q3 performance figures.
Light refreshments will be provided.
steps.question: Where will the meeting be held?
steps.question_kr: 회의는 어디서 열릴 것인가?
choices: (A) In Conference Room B on the third floor
(B) In the main auditorium
(C) In the director's office
(D) In the cafeteria on the ground floor
steps.kr: 회의는 3층 회의실 B에서 열린다. 업데이트된 프로젝트 보고서를 지참하고 3분기 실적 수치를 논의할 준비를 해 주세요. 간단한 다과가 제공될 예정입니다.

sentences: If you are unable to attend in person, please contact Sarah at ext. 304 to arrange a video call connection.
I apologize for any inconvenience this change may cause and appreciate your flexibility.
steps.question: What is implied about the meeting?
steps.question_kr: 회의에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) Remote participation is possible
(B) Attendance is optional for all staff
(C) It will be recorded for absent members
(D) It will be held entirely online
steps.kr: 직접 참석할 수 없는 경우 304번으로 Sarah에게 연락하여 화상 통화 연결을 마련해 주세요. 변경으로 인한 불편에 사과드리며 협조해 주셔서 감사합니다.

sentences: Dear Customer Service Team, I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with an order I received on March 10.
Order number 48271 contained a damaged item and was missing one of the three products I had purchased.
steps.question: Why did the customer write this email?
steps.question_kr: 고객은 왜 이 이메일을 작성했는가?
choices: (A) To complain about a problem with an order
(B) To inquire about delivery options
(C) To apply for a store membership
(D) To request a product catalog
choices_kr: (B) 주문 문제에 대해 불만을 제기하기 위해
steps.kr: 고객 서비스 팀 귀중, 3월 10일에 받은 주문에 대한 불만을 표현하기 위해 이메일을 씁니다. 주문번호 48271에는 파손된 물품이 포함되어 있었고 제품 중 하나가 누락되어 있었습니다.

sentences: I have included photographs of the damaged packaging as well as a screenshot of my original order confirmation.
I would like to request either a full replacement of the damaged item or a refund for the missing product.
steps.question: What does the customer request?
steps.question_kr: 고객이 요청하는 것은?
choices: (A) A replacement or refund
(B) A discount on a future order
(C) An upgrade to express delivery
(D) Free shipping on the next purchase
steps.kr: 파손된 포장의 사진과 주문 확인서의 스크린샷을 첨부했습니다. 파손된 물품의 완전한 교체품이나 누락된 제품에 대한 환불을 요청합니다.

sentences: I have been a loyal customer for over five years and have always been satisfied with your service until now.
I hope this matter can be resolved promptly so that I can continue to shop with confidence.
steps.question: What is implied about the customer?
steps.question_kr: 고객에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) She has complained to the company before
(B) She plans to stop shopping at the store
(C) She is requesting compensation for emotional distress
(D) She generally has a positive view of the company
choices_kr: (D) 정신적 피해에 대한 보상을 요청하고 있다
(C) 이전에 회사에 불만을 제기한 적이 있다
(B) 일반적으로 회사에 긍정적인 시각을 가지고 있다
steps.kr: 저는 5년 이상 충성 고객이었으며 지금까지 항상 서비스에 만족했습니다. 이 문제가 신속히 해결되어 계속 안심하고 쇼핑할 수 있기를 바랍니다.

sentences: Dear Mr. Harrington, I am writing on behalf of Delton Consulting Group to inquire about the office space currently listed for rent at 240 Harbor Boulevard.
Our company is seeking a modern, well-connected workspace for approximately 25 employees, and your property appears to meet our requirements.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지의 목적은 무엇인가?
choices: (A) To negotiate the price of an existing lease
(B) To request a list of available properties
(C) To inquire about an available office space
(D) To report problems with a current rental property
choices_kr: (D) 이용 가능한 건물 목록을 요청하기 위해
(C) 현재 임대 건물의 문제를 보고하기 위해
(B) 이용 가능한 사무 공간에 대해 문의하기 위해
steps.kr: Harrington 씨께, Delton Consulting Group을 대표하여 240 Harbor Boulevard에 임대로 등록된 사무 공간에 대해 문의합니다. 저희 회사는 약 25명의 직원을 위한 현대적이고 교통이 편리한 업무 공간을 찾고 있습니다.

sentences: We would prefer a lease term of at least two years, with the option to renew.
Could you please provide information on the monthly rental rate, available parking, and whether the space includes high-speed internet infrastructure?
steps.question: Which of the following does the writer ask about?
steps.question_kr: 작성자가 문의하는 것은?
choices: (A) The names of current tenants
(B) The number of floors in the building
(C) The building's renovation history
(D) The monthly rental cost and parking
steps.kr: 저희는 갱신 옵션과 함께 최소 2년의 임대 기간을 선호합니다. 월 임대료, 이용 가능한 주차, 고속 인터넷 인프라 포함 여부에 대한 정보를 제공해 주시겠습니까?

sentences: We are also open to discussing flexible move-in dates, as our current lease does not expire until the end of next month.
Should the space meet our needs, we would be prepared to arrange a site visit at your earliest convenience.
Please feel free to contact me directly at d.kim@delton.com.
steps.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned in the letter?
steps.question_kr: 편지에서 언급되지 않은 것은?
choices: (A) The writer's contact information
(B) Willingness to schedule a property visit
(C) The company's preferred move-in date
(D) The company's number of employees
steps.kr: 저희는 유연한 이사 날짜 협의도 가능합니다. 공간이 요건을 충족하면 현장 방문을 준비할 용의가 있습니다. d.kim@delton.com으로 직접 연락 주시기 바랍니다.

sentences: Dear Ms. Chen, On behalf of the entire team at Pinnacle Financial Services, I am delighted to welcome you as our newest team member.
Your appointment as Senior Financial Analyst becomes effective on Monday, September 2.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this email?
steps.question_kr: 이 이메일의 주요 목적은 무엇인가?
choices: (A) To invite Ms. Chen to a company event
(B) To welcome a new employee to the company
(C) To confirm Ms. Chen's resignation
(D) To offer Ms. Chen a job position
choices_kr: (D) Chen 씨를 회사 행사에 초대하기 위해
steps.kr: Chen 씨께, Pinnacle Financial Services 팀 전체를 대표하여 최신 팀원으로 환영합니다. 수석 재무 분석가로의 임명은 9월 2일 월요일부터 발효됩니다.

sentences: Please report to the main reception on the 12th floor at 9 A.M. on your first day, where you will receive your building access card and meet with HR.
Your direct supervisor, Mr. James Ortega, will then conduct a brief orientation session before introducing you to the rest of the team.
steps.question: What will Ms. Chen do when she arrives on her first day?
steps.question_kr: Chen 씨는 첫날 도착했을 때 무엇을 하는가?
choices: (A) Attend a company-wide presentation
(B) Complete online training modules
(C) Meet with the CEO for a welcome lunch
(D) Go to the 12th floor reception to receive her access card
steps.kr: 첫날 오전 9시에 12층 메인 안내 데스크에 출석하시면 건물 출입 카드를 받고 인사팀을 만나실 것입니다. 직속 상사인 James Ortega 씨가 오리엔테이션을 진행합니다.

sentences: We have prepared a full onboarding package including your employee handbook, benefits information, and IT setup instructions.
We are confident that your expertise in risk assessment and financial modeling will make a significant impact on our department.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Ms. Chen?
steps.question_kr: Chen 씨에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) She is a recent university graduate
(B) She will manage the HR department
(C) She transferred from another department
(D) She has specialized skills in finance
choices_kr: (B) 재무 분야의 전문 기술을 보유하고 있다
steps.kr: 직원 핸드북, 복리후생 정보, IT 설정 지침을 포함한 완전한 온보딩 패키지를 준비했습니다. 리스크 평가와 재무 모델링에 대한 귀하의 전문성이 우리 부서에 큰 영향을 미칠 것이라 확신합니다.

sentences: Dear Mr. Patterson, I am writing on behalf of the Greenhill Residents' Association to formally request a meeting with the city planning department regarding the proposed development on Elm Street.
We represent over 400 households in the area and have significant concerns about the project's impact on local traffic and green spaces.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A representative of a residents' association
(B) A property developer
(C) A city planning official
(D) A local newspaper journalist
steps.kr: Patterson 씨께, Greenhill 주민 협회를 대표하여 Elm Street의 제안된 개발에 관해 시 계획 부서와의 공식적인 회의를 요청하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 저희는 이 지역의 400가구 이상을 대표하며 프로젝트의 지역 교통과 녹지 공간에 대한 영향에 대해 상당한 우려가 있습니다.

sentences: We are requesting that a public consultation session be held before any planning approval is granted.
The association would also like to review the environmental impact assessment report, which we understand has not yet been made publicly available.
steps.question: What does the association request?
steps.question_kr: 협회가 요청하는 것은?
choices: (A) A public consultation before planning approval
(B) A reduction in the size of the development
(C) The cancellation of the development project
(D) Immediate access to the construction site
steps.kr: 저희는 계획 승인이 승인되기 전에 공개 협의 세션을 개최해 줄 것을 요청한다. 협회는 또한 아직 공개적으로 이용 가능하지 않다고 이해하는 환경 영향 평가 보고서를 검토하고 싶다.

sentences: Our members have lived in this neighborhood for an average of 18 years and take great pride in the community they have built.
We trust that the city will take our concerns seriously and look forward to a productive dialogue.
steps.question: What is implied about the residents?
steps.question_kr: 주민들에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) They recently moved into the neighborhood
(B) They have strong ties to their community
(C) They fully support the Elm Street development
(D) They plan to take legal action against the city
choices_kr: (B) 지역 사회에 강한 유대감을 가지고 있다
(D) 시를 상대로 법적 조치를 취할 계획이다
steps.kr: 저희 회원들은 평균 18년 동안 이 지역에 살았으며 그들이 만든 커뮤니티에 큰 자부심을 가지고 있다. 시가 저희 우려를 진지하게 받아들이고 생산적인 대화를 기대한다.

sentences: Dear Ms. Watkins, Thank you for your interest in the Regional Sales Manager position at Apex Retail Group.
After careful consideration of your application and interview performance, we are pleased to offer you the position with a starting salary of $72,000 per year.
steps.question: Who is this letter most likely addressed to?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지는 누구에게 쓴 것일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A supplier representative
(B) A current employee seeking a promotion
(C) A client of Apex Retail Group
(D) A job applicant who has been selected
steps.kr: Watkins 씨께, Apex Retail Group의 지역 영업 관리자 직책에 관심을 가져주셔서 감사합니다. 귀하의 지원서와 면접 성과를 신중하게 고려한 후, 연봉 $72,000의 시작 급여로 해당 직책을 제안하게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: The position requires relocation to our Chicago headquarters, for which the company will provide a relocation allowance of up to $5,000.
We ask that you confirm your acceptance of this offer in writing by Friday, May 16.
steps.question: What is the deadline for accepting the offer?
steps.question_kr: 제안 수락 기한은 언제인가?
choices: (A) May 10
(B) May 20
(C) May 31
(D) May 16
steps.kr: 이 직책은 시카고 본사로의 이전이 필요하며, 회사는 최대 $5,000의 이전 수당을 제공한다. 5월 16일 금요일까지 서면으로 이 제안의 수락을 확인해 주시기 바랍니다.

sentences: We were particularly impressed by your ten years of experience in retail management and your track record of exceeding quarterly sales targets.
We are confident that you will be a strong addition to our leadership team.
steps.question: What is implied about Ms. Watkins?
steps.question_kr: Watkins 씨에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) She stood out among the applicants
(B) She has limited experience in retail
(C) She applied for a lower-level position
(D) She is currently unemployed
steps.kr: 저희는 특히 소매 관리에서의 10년 경험과 분기별 판매 목표를 초과한 실적에 깊은 인상을 받았습니다. 귀하가 저희 리더십 팀에 강력한 인재가 될 것이라고 확신합니다.

sentences: Dear Purchasing Manager, I am writing to introduce BioClean Solutions, a leading supplier of eco-friendly cleaning products for commercial facilities.
Our product line includes biodegradable detergents, surface sanitizers, and industrial degreasers, all certified by the Environmental Standards Board.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A sales representative from a cleaning product company
(B) A facility maintenance supervisor
(C) An environmental organization spokesperson
(D) A government health inspector
steps.kr: 구매 담당자 귀중, 상업 시설을 위한 친환경 청소 제품의 선도적 공급업체인 BioClean Solutions를 소개하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 저희 제품 라인에는 Environmental Standards Board의 인증을 받은 생분해성 세제, 표면 소독제, 산업용 탈지제가 포함된다.

sentences: We are currently offering a trial package of our three bestselling products at a 40% discount for new commercial clients.
To arrange a product demonstration or request a sample kit, please contact our sales team at sales@bioclean.com.
steps.question: What is available to new commercial clients?
steps.question_kr: 신규 상업 고객에게 이용 가능한 것은?
choices: (A) A free site visit from a cleaning specialist
(B) Priority delivery on all future orders
(C) A trial package at a 40% discount
(D) A one-year free supply of cleaning products
choices_kr: (D) 모든 미래 주문에 대한 우선 배달
steps.kr: 저희는 현재 신규 상업 고객을 위해 3가지 베스트셀러 제품의 체험 패키지를 40% 할인하여 제공하고 있다. 제품 시연을 마련하거나 샘플 키트를 요청하려면 sales@bioclean.com으로 영업팀에 연락해 주세요.

sentences: BioClean Solutions has partnered with over 300 businesses across the country, including hotels, hospitals, and office complexes.
Our clients report an average reduction of 35% in cleaning-related costs after switching to our products.
steps.question: What is implied about BioClean's products?
steps.question_kr: BioClean의 제품에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) They are only suitable for small offices
(B) They are cost-effective for businesses
(C) They are more expensive than competing brands
(D) They have recently been introduced to the market
steps.kr: BioClean Solutions는 호텔, 병원, 오피스 컴플렉스를 포함하여 전국 300개 이상의 기업과 파트너십을 맺었다. 저희 고객들은 저희 제품으로 전환한 후 청소 관련 비용이 평균 35% 감소했다고 보고한다.

sentences: Dear Professor Nguyen, I am a third-year student in your Department of Environmental Science and I am writing to request your guidance regarding graduate school applications.
I have been considering applying to doctoral programs in climate science and would value your advice on selecting suitable institutions and preparing a strong research proposal.
steps.question: Who is this letter written to?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지는 누구에게 쓴 것인가?
choices: (A) A doctoral program graduate student
(B) A university admissions officer
(C) A research institute director
(D) A university professor
steps.kr: Nguyen 교수님께, 저는 교수님의 환경 과학 학과 3학년 학생이며 대학원 지원에 관한 지도를 요청하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 저는 기후 과학 박사 프로그램 지원을 고려하고 있으며 적합한 기관 선택과 강력한 연구 제안서 준비에 대한 교수님의 조언을 소중히 여길 것이다.

sentences: I am particularly interested in researching the effects of urban heat islands on local ecosystems and believe this aligns with the work being conducted in your laboratory.
I would be grateful if you could meet with me at your convenience to discuss my options.
steps.question: What research topic is the student interested in?
steps.question_kr: 학생이 관심 있는 연구 주제는?
choices: (A) Urban heat islands and local ecosystems
(B) Ocean pollution and marine biodiversity
(C) Arctic ice melting and sea level rise
(D) Renewable energy and carbon emissions
steps.kr: 저는 특히 도시 열섬이 지역 생태계에 미치는 영향을 연구하는 데 관심이 있으며 이것이 교수님의 연구실에서 수행되는 연구와 일치한다고 생각한다. 편하신 시간에 저의 옵션을 논의하기 위해 만나 주신다면 감사하겠다.

sentences: I maintain a GPA of 3.9 and have completed two research assistantships, including one studying air quality patterns in metropolitan areas last summer.
I am also the recipient of the Dean's Award for Academic Excellence for the past two consecutive years.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the student?
steps.question_kr: 학생에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) She is struggling academically
(B) She is a strong academic performer with research experience
(C) She has no prior research experience
(D) She has already been accepted to a doctoral program
choices_kr: (B) 연구 경험이 있는 우수한 학업 성적자이다
steps.kr: 저는 GPA 3.9를 유지하고 있으며 지난 여름 대도시 지역의 대기 질 패턴을 연구하는 연구 조교를 포함하여 두 가지 연구 조교직을 완료했다. 저는 또한 지난 2년 연속으로 학업 우수 학장상 수상자이다.

sentences: Dear Ms. Alvarez, I am writing to follow up on the project proposal I submitted to your team on March 1.
As the director of Blue Horizon Creative Agency, I am eager to know whether Aldermoor Publishing has had the opportunity to review the campaign concept we developed for your spring catalogue launch.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) The head of an advertising agency
(B) A publisher reviewing a manuscript
(C) A freelance graphic designer
(D) A marketing consultant at Aldermoor Publishing
steps.kr: Alvarez 씨께, 3월 1일에 귀하의 팀에 제출한 프로젝트 제안서에 대한 후속 조치를 위해 편지를 씁니다. Blue Horizon Creative Agency의 대표로서, Aldermoor Publishing이 저희가 봄 카탈로그 출시를 위해 개발한 캠페인 개념을 검토할 기회가 있었는지 알고 싶습니다.

sentences: The proposal outlines a multi-channel strategy combining print, digital, and social media elements designed to reach your target demographic of readers aged 25 to 44.
Our estimated budget for the full campaign is $85,000, which includes content creation, design, and distribution costs.
steps.question: What is the estimated budget for the campaign?
steps.question_kr: 캠페인의 예상 예산은 얼마인가?
steps.kr: 제안서는 25~44세 독자층의 목표 인구 통계에 도달하도록 설계된 인쇄, 디지털, 소셜 미디어 요소를 결합한 멀티채널 전략을 개요한다. 전체 캠페인의 예상 예산은 콘텐츠 제작, 디자인, 배포 비용을 포함하여 $85,000이다.

sentences: We have previously collaborated with three other major publishing houses on similar catalogue campaigns and would be happy to provide references upon request.
I would welcome the opportunity to present the proposal in person at a time that suits your schedule.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Blue Horizon Creative Agency?
steps.question_kr: Blue Horizon Creative Agency에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It has experience in publishing-related campaigns
(B) It is a newly established company
(C) It is based in the same city as Aldermoor Publishing
(D) It only works with digital media platforms
steps.kr: 저희는 이전에 유사한 카탈로그 캠페인으로 다른 세 개의 주요 출판사와 협력했으며 요청 시 기꺼이 참고인을 제공한다. 저는 귀하의 일정에 맞는 시간에 직접 제안서를 발표할 기회를 환영합니다.

sentences: Dear Mr. Romano, I am reaching out on behalf of the student council of Blackwood University to request your participation as a guest speaker at our annual Leadership Summit on April 19.
As the founder of three successful social enterprises, your insights on ethical leadership and sustainable business practices would be invaluable to our student audience.
steps.question: Who is the intended recipient of this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지의 의도된 수신인은 누구인가?
choices: (A) A university administrator reviewing an event
(B) A university professor who teaches business
(C) A student applying for a leadership award
(D) A successful entrepreneur being invited to speak
steps.kr: Romano 씨께, 4월 19일 저희의 연간 Leadership Summit에 초청 연사로 참여해 주시기를 요청하기 위해 Blackwood University 학생회를 대표하여 연락드립니다. 세 개의 성공적인 사회적 기업의 설립자로서, 윤리적 리더십과 지속 가능한 비즈니스 관행에 대한 귀하의 통찰력은 저희 학생 청중에게 매우 귀중할 것이다.

sentences: The summit will be held in the Kennedy Auditorium and is expected to attract approximately 400 students, faculty, and local business professionals.
We are requesting a 45-minute keynote address followed by a 15-minute Q&A session.
steps.question: How long is the requested keynote address?
steps.question_kr: 요청된 기조 연설은 얼마나 길어야 하는가?
choices: (A) 90 minutes
(B) 30 minutes
(C) 60 minutes
(D) 45 minutes
steps.kr: 정상 회담은 Kennedy Auditorium에서 개최되며 약 400명의 학생, 교수진, 지역 비즈니스 전문가를 유치할 것으로 예상된다. 저희는 15분의 Q&A 세션이 뒤따르는 45분의 기조 연설을 요청하고 있다.

sentences: We are able to provide an honorarium of $500 and will cover all travel and accommodation expenses for the day.
Please let us know by March 25 whether you are able to accept this invitation, and we will send you further details about the event format and logistics.
steps.question: What is implied about the event organizers?
steps.question_kr: 행사 주최자들에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) They are unsure about the event date
(B) They are willing to cover the speaker's costs
(C) They expect the speaker to bring their own materials
(D) They have a limited budget for the event
choices_kr: (C) 연사가 자신의 자료를 가져올 것을 기대한다
steps.kr: 저희는 $500의 사례비를 제공할 수 있으며 당일 모든 여행 및 숙박 비용을 부담한다. 이 초대를 수락할 수 있는지 3월 25일까지 알려주시면 행사 형식과 물류에 대한 추가 세부 정보를 보내드리겠습니다.

sentences: Dear Mr. Fleming, I am writing to inform you that your application for the Sunrise Cottage rental property at 14 Bayshore Lane has been approved.
As the property manager at Coastal Retreats Ltd., I am pleased to confirm that the cottage will be available for your requested dates of July 12 to July 26.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A property management company representative
(B) The owner of the cottage personally
(C) A travel agency booking agent
(D) A local government housing official
steps.kr: Fleming 씨께, 14 Bayshore Lane의 Sunrise Cottage 임대 부동산에 대한 귀하의 신청이 승인되었음을 알리기 위해 편지를 씁니다. Coastal Retreats Ltd.의 부동산 관리자로서, 7월 12일부터 7월 26일까지 귀하가 요청한 날짜에 별장이 이용 가능함을 확인하게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: The total rental fee for the two-week stay is $2,800, with a security deposit of $400 required upon booking confirmation.
Full payment of the remaining balance must be received no later than June 30.
steps.question: By when must the full payment be received?
steps.question_kr: 전액 결제는 언제까지 받아야 하는가?
choices: (A) At the time of check-in
(B) By July 26
(C) By June 30
(D) By July 12
steps.kr: 2주 숙박의 총 임대료는 $2,800이며 예약 확인 시 $400의 보증금이 필요하다. 나머지 잔액의 전액 결제는 6월 30일까지 받아야 한다.

sentences: The cottage is equipped with a full kitchen, outdoor barbecue area, and direct beach access, making it ideal for families and groups of up to six people.
Please review the attached house rules and local area guide before your arrival.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Mr. Fleming's stay?
steps.question_kr: Fleming 씨의 숙박에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) He may be traveling with family or a group
(B) He has stayed at the cottage before
(C) He plans to extend his stay beyond July 26
(D) He will be staying alone
choices_kr: (B) 가족이나 그룹과 함께 여행할 수 있다
steps.kr: 별장에는 풀 주방, 야외 바비큐 구역, 직접 해변 접근이 갖춰져 있어 최대 6명의 가족과 그룹에 이상적이다. 도착 전에 첨부된 하우스 규칙과 지역 안내서를 검토해 주세요.

sentences: Dear Board of Directors, I am writing to formally submit my resignation as Chief Financial Officer of Meridan Logistics, effective March 31.
This decision has not been made lightly, as I have greatly valued my eight years with this organization and the relationships I have built with each of you.
steps.question: Who wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구인가?
choices: (A) A consultant presenting a business proposal
(B) A newly hired CFO joining the company
(C) An investor withdrawing from the board
(D) An executive resigning from the company
steps.kr: 이사회 귀중, 3월 31일부로 Meridan Logistics의 최고 재무 책임자직을 공식적으로 사임하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 이 결정은 가볍게 내린 것이 아니며, 이 조직에서의 8년과 여러분 각각과 쌓아온 관계를 매우 소중하게 여겼습니다.

sentences: I am committed to ensuring a seamless transition and will work closely with the incoming CFO and my team over the next six weeks to transfer all responsibilities.
A comprehensive handover document covering all active projects, financial processes, and key contacts will be prepared by March 15.
steps.question: By when will the handover document be ready?
steps.question_kr: 인수인계 문서는 언제까지 준비되는가?
choices: (A) March 31
(B) March 15
(C) February 28
(D) April 15
steps.kr: 저는 원활한 전환을 보장하기 위해 헌신하며 다음 6주 동안 후임 CFO 및 팀과 긴밀히 협력하여 모든 책임을 이전할 것이다. 모든 활성 프로젝트, 재무 프로세스, 주요 연락처를 다루는 포괄적인 인수인계 문서는 3월 15일까지 준비될 것이다.

sentences: I have accepted an exciting opportunity to lead the financial operations of a start-up focused on sustainable infrastructure, which aligns more closely with my long-term career goals.
I am deeply grateful for the trust and support the board has shown me throughout my tenure.
steps.question: Why did the CFO decide to resign?
steps.question_kr: CFO가 사임을 결정한 이유는 무엇인가?
choices: (A) She is retiring from the workforce entirely
(B) She was asked to leave by the board
(C) She received a new career opportunity elsewhere
(D) She plans to start her own financial consulting firm
choices_kr: (C) 자신의 재무 컨설팅 회사를 시작할 계획이다
(B) 다른 곳에서 새로운 취업 기회를 받았다
steps.kr: 저는 지속 가능한 인프라에 초점을 맞춘 스타트업의 재무 운영을 이끄는 흥미로운 기회를 수락했으며, 이것은 제 장기적인 커리어 목표와 더 밀접하게 일치한다. 재직 기간 동안 이사회가 보여준 신뢰와 지원에 깊이 감사드립니다.

sentences: Dear Ms. O'Brien, I am contacting you as the winner of this year's Regional Short Story Competition, organized by the Lakewood Writers' Guild.

On behalf of all the judges, I am delighted to inform you that your story, 'The Last Garden,' received the highest score across all categories including originality, narrative structure, and emotional impact.
steps.question: Who is the letter addressed to?
steps.question_kr: 편지가 누구에게 보내진 것인가?
choices: (A) A competition winner
(B) A competition organizer
(C) A competition judge
(D) A literary magazine editor
steps.kr: O'Brien 씨께, Lakewood Writers' Guild가 주최하는 올해 지역 단편 소설 대회의 우승자로서 연락드립니다. 모든 심사위원을 대표하여 귀하의 소설 'The Last Garden'이 독창성, 서사 구조, 감성적 임팩트를 포함한 모든 카테고리에서 가장 높은 점수를 받았음을 알리게 되어 기쁩니다.

sentences: You will receive a prize of $1,500, a one-year membership to the Writers' Guild, and your story will be published in the spring edition of our literary journal, Lakewood Review.
We ask that you attend the award ceremony on May 10 at the Lakewood Library, where you will be invited to read an excerpt from your story.
steps.question: Where will the award ceremony be held?
steps.question_kr: 시상식은 어디서 열리는가?
choices: (A) At the Lakewood Library
(B) At the Lakewood Writers' Guild office
(C) At a downtown hotel ballroom
(D) At a local university auditorium
steps.kr: 귀하는 $1,500의 상금, Writers' Guild 1년 회원권을 받으며 귀하의 소설은 저희 문학 저널 Lakewood Review의 봄 호에 게재된다. 5월 10일 Lakewood Library에서 열리는 시상식에 참석하여 소설의 발췌문을 읽어 주시기 바랍니다.

sentences: This year's competition attracted 312 submissions from across the region, the highest number in the Guild's 25-year history.
Your win reflects not only your writing talent but also the authentic voice and lived experience evident in your storytelling.
steps.question: What is implied about the competition?
steps.question_kr: 대회에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is being held for the first time
(B) It was less popular than in previous years
(C) Only professional writers were eligible to enter
(D) It had record-breaking participation this year
steps.kr: 올해 대회는 이 지역 전역에서 312건의 제출을 유치했으며 Guild의 25년 역사상 가장 많은 수이다. 귀하의 수상은 작가로서의 재능뿐만 아니라 스토리텔링에서 나타나는 진정한 목소리와 삶의 경험을 반영한다.

sentences: Dear Mr. Sullivan, I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the professional development scholarship I received from the Sullivan Foundation last month.

As a nurse working in a rural community clinic, this funding has made it possible for me to enroll in an advanced emergency care certification program that would otherwise have been financially out of reach.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A foundation board member
(B) A scholarship recipient working in healthcare
(C) A university financial aid officer
(D) A hospital administrator requesting funding
steps.kr: Sullivan 씨께, 지난달 Sullivan Foundation으로부터 받은 전문성 개발 장학금에 진심으로 감사를 표현하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. 농촌 지역 클리닉에서 근무하는 간호사로서, 이 자금 덕분에 그렇지 않았으면 재정적으로 감당할 수 없었을 고급 응급 처치 자격증 프로그램에 등록할 수 있게 되었습니다.

sentences: The program runs for six months and will equip me with skills in trauma response, cardiac emergencies, and pediatric care that are critically needed in my area.
Upon completion, I plan to offer free workshops to community members on basic first aid and emergency preparedness.
steps.question: What does the writer plan to do after completing the program?
steps.question_kr: 작성자는 프로그램 완료 후 무엇을 할 계획인가?
choices: (A) Apply for a position at a large urban hospital
(B) Start a private medical practice
(C) Offer free first aid workshops to the community
(D) Begin teaching nursing at a local college
choices_kr: (B) 지역 사회에 무료 응급 처치 워크숍 제공
steps.kr: 프로그램은 6개월 동안 진행되며 제가 있는 지역에서 매우 필요한 외상 대응, 심장 응급 상황, 소아과 진료 기술을 갖추게 해준다. 완료 후 지역 사회 구성원들에게 기본 응급 처치와 비상 대비에 관한 무료 워크숍을 제공할 계획이다.

sentences: Healthcare access remains a persistent challenge in my region, where the nearest hospital is over 45 minutes away and specialist services are virtually unavailable.
Your foundation's investment in frontline health workers like me directly translates into better outcomes for the communities we serve.
steps.question: What is implied about the writer's community?
steps.question_kr: 작성자의 지역 사회에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It recently received major government health funding
(B) It has limited access to medical services
(C) It has an abundance of healthcare facilities
(D) It is located in a large metropolitan area
choices_kr: (C) 최근 대규모 정부 의료 자금을 받았다
steps.kr: 의료 접근은 제 지역에서 지속적인 과제로 남아 있으며, 가장 가까운 병원까지 45분 이상 걸리고 전문가 서비스는 사실상 이용 불가하다. 저와 같은 일선 의료 종사자에 대한 귀하의 재단의 투자는 저희가 서비스를 제공하는 지역 사회의 더 나은 결과로 직결된다.

sentences: Dear Ms. Kim, I am writing regarding 내부 감사 결과 통보 and wish to address this matter as promptly as possible.
As the compliance officer, I believe this communication is essential to ensure a clear and productive resolution for all parties involved.
steps.question: Who most likely wrote this letter?
steps.question_kr: 이 편지를 쓴 사람은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
choices: (A) A compliance officer
(B) An independent mediator
(C) A government official
(D) A CFO
steps.kr: 내부 감사 결과 통보에 관해 가능한 한 신속하게 이 문제를 해결하기 위해 편지를 씁니다. compliance officer로서, 이 소통이 관련된 모든 당사자들에게 명확하고 생산적인 해결을 보장하는 데 필수적이라고 생각합니다.

sentences: We kindly request that you review the attached documentation related to audit findings and provide a response within five business days.
Should you require any additional information or clarification, please do not hesitate to contact our office directly.
steps.question: What is the writer requesting?
steps.question_kr: 작성자가 요청하는 것은?
choices: (A) A face-to-face meeting at the earliest opportunity
(B) A written guarantee from senior management
(C) Review of attached documents and a response
(D) Immediate payment for services rendered
choices_kr: (C) 가능한 빠른 시일 내 대면 미팅
steps.kr: audit findings와 관련된 첨부 서류를 검토하고 5영업일 이내에 답변을 제공해 주시기 바랍니다. 추가 정보나 명확화가 필요하신 경우 주저하지 마시고 저희 사무소에 직접 연락해 주세요.

sentences: We value our ongoing professional relationship and hope that this matter can be resolved in a manner that is mutually beneficial.
Please be assured that we remain committed to maintaining open communication and working collaboratively toward a satisfactory outcome.
steps.question: What is implied about the relationship between the writer and recipient?
steps.question_kr: 작성자와 수신인의 관계에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) They have never communicated before
(B) They are colleagues at the same company

steps.kr: 저희는 지속적인 전문적 관계를 소중히 여기며 이 문제가 상호 이익이 되는 방식으로 해결되기를 희망한다. 저희는 개방적인 소통을 유지하고 만족스러운 결과를 향해 협력적으로 일하기 위해 헌신하고 있음을 안심하셔도 됩니다.
